records.question: Which customers from Tennessee have made complaints about products?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN complaints ON customers.customer_id = complaints.customer_id
JOIN products ON complaints.product_id = products.product_id
WHERE customers.state = 'Tennessee'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT Customers.customer_id 
FROM Customers 
JOIN Complaints ON Customers.customer_id = Complaints.customer_id 
WHERE Customers.state = 'Tennessee'

records.question: Which customers live at 039 Jedidiah Estate Suite 537 in Sauerberg and have open complaints being handled by a male staff member named Ward with phone number (379)551-0838x146?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN complaints ON customers.customer_id = complaints.customer_id
JOIN staff ON complaints.staff_id = staff.staff_id
WHERE customers.town_city = 'Sauerberg' AND staff.gender = '0' AND customers.address_line_1 = '039 Jedidiah Estate Suite 537' AND staff.first_name = 'Ward' AND complaints.complaint_status_code = 'Open' AND staff.phone_number = '(379)551-0838x146'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Customers.customer_id 
FROM Customers 
JOIN Complaints ON Customers.customer_id = Complaints.customer_id 
JOIN Staff ON Complaints.staff_id = Staff.staff_id 
WHERE Customers.address_line_1 = '039 Jedidiah Estate Suite 537' 
AND Customers.town_city = 'Sauerberg' 
AND Complaints.complaint_status_code = 'open' 
AND Staff.gender = 'M' 
AND Staff.first_name = 'Ward' 
AND Staff.phone_number = '(379)551-0838x146'

records.question: Who are the customers with phone number 578.019.7943x328 living in Suite 035 in West Annamariestad, Iowa who have complaints marked OK raised on or after 2002-07-18 10:59:35?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN complaints ON customers.customer_id = complaints.customer_id
WHERE customers.state = 'Iowa' AND complaints.complaint_outcome_code = 'OK' AND complaints.date_complaint_raised >= '2002-07-18 10:59:35' AND customers.phone_number = '578.019.7943x328' AND customers.town_city = 'West Annamariestad' AND customers.address_line_2 = 'Suite 035'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Customers.customer_id 
FROM Customers 
JOIN Complaints ON Customers.customer_id = Complaints.customer_id 
WHERE Customers.phone_number = '578.019.7943x328' 
AND Customers.address_line_2 = 'Suite 035' 
AND Customers.town_city = 'West Annamariestad' 
AND Customers.state = 'Iowa' 
AND Complaints.complaint_outcome_code = 'OK' 
AND Complaints.date_complaint_raised >= '2002-07-18 10:59:35'

records.question: Who are the customers with phone number 470-803-0244, email address cayla.satterfield@example.net, and living at 039 Jedidiah Estate Suite 537, Apt. 245 in Sauerberg, Hawaii?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
WHERE customers.phone_number = '470-803-0244' AND customers.address_line_2 = 'Apt. 245' AND customers.town_city = 'Sauerberg' AND customers.address_line_1 = '039 Jedidiah Estate Suite 537' AND customers.state = 'Hawaii' AND customers.email_address = 'cayla.satterfield@example.net'
